PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-29-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No Appearances

This matter comes on calendar for a Petition for Probate. The Court finds that notice is appropriate and there being no objections, the Will dated May 7, 2015 is admitted to Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. Cynthia Diana Whitehead is appointed Executor of the Estate with full authority. Bond will be set at 377,000.00 dollars. Status of Close of the Estate is set for June 29, 2022 at 9:00 AM in Department 204. If a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition on Report of Status Administration is on file, the matter will be taken off calendar. Shirley Yawitz is appointed as the Probate Referee. Order signed in open court. Court stands adjourned.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Jones, Deputy: N. Ng. Matter Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-08-2020 Continued To Dec-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
